## Checklist

- [ ] I pulled latest `main` and resolved any conflicts locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run dev:all` and smoke-tested the affected pages
- [ ] No new dependencies committed without discussion
- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, or `console.log` of tokens
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in this PR (one concern per PR)
- [ ] Screenshots/GIF attached if this touches UI
